metadata.name: Docker Volume Backup
metadata.description:
Ansible playbook to back up data from a Docker container path by auto-attaching all container volumes into a temporary backup container. Creates timestamped tar.gz archives and supports retention.

Project: https://www.docker.com
Documentation: https://docs.docker.com/storage/volumes/
metadata.author: Christian Lempa

variables.name: container_name
variables.title: Container Name
variables.description: Name of the Docker container to back up

variables.name: backup_retention_days
variables.title: Retention Days
variables.description: Delete backup archives older than this many days

variables.name: backup_container_path
variables.title: Container Path To Backup
variables.description: Path inside the container that should be archived

variables.name: stop_containers_during_backup
variables.title: Stop Container During Backup
variables.description: If enabled, stop the container before backup and start it again afterwards if it was running
